content.en:
With the strength of the Golden Light Supreme and the others, it didn't take long for them to detect the breath of the Origin Realm.

"That's the Origin Realm......"

The golden light supreme's pupils shrank, shocked and full of excitement at the same time.

That's the legendary Origin Realm, in the Twelfth Universe Era, he said a few words to the entire universe, but he didn't find the Origin Realm, he just heard of the Origin Realm.

Because in the Twelfth Universe Era, the Origin of the Universe was far stronger than it is now, so the Origin Realm was even more difficult to find, and even if he mobilized many strong people, he could not find the Origin Realm.

Moreover, the origin realm is located in a special latitude, which cannot be found by breaking the space layer by layer, and it is necessary to find a specific node, and only by breaking the spatial latitude at the node level can you find an entrance.

And in the entire Origin Realm, there are not many such entrances.

How big the universe is, there are only a few nodes, how to find it, unless the consciousness can penetrate the entire universe and cover the entire universe space, it can easily find the origin realm.

But if you want to have such a means, you can't do it, unless it's far beyond the realm of the detached, but is that possible?

Therefore, if you want to find the Origin Realm, you can only rely on luck, and there is no other way.

Of course, once you find the node of the Origin Realm, it is simple to open the entrance to the Origin Realm.

It can be said that mastering the entrance to the Origin Realm is equivalent to mastering the means to enter the Origin Realm.

However, this is only a temporary entrance.

"The Origin of the Universe has its own rules, it is impossible for him to allow too many people to enter the Origin Realm, and he does not allow too strong people to enter the Origin Realm, once a supreme-level powerhouse enters the Origin Realm, that node will be transferred instantly, maybe a supreme can be trapped in the Origin Realm! Fortunately, the time for the Aurora and other children of the Era to enter it is not long, and there is still a long time. The Golden Light Supreme muttered.

At this time, another Supreme said: "Golden Light Supreme, how precious the Origin Realm is, it is rumored that there is also Origin Well Water in it, even if we dare not enter, but if we send some more Cosmic Gods to enter, in case we find the Origin Well, we can get some Origin Well Water." As long as we allow heavy profits, we may be able to trade the original well water!"

"Okay, let's let the remaining sons of the Twelve Universe Eras, Supreme Highnesses, enter the Origin Realm, and let them bring out the Origin Well water at all costs. Moreover, there is not only the Origin Well, but also many rare materials and treasures. This is also a big opportunity for us!"

The Golden Light Supreme said excitedly.

Immediately, he summoned the Lord of the Yuangu.

And soon, the First Divine Lord of the Ten Thousand Races and others also knew about this matter, because they couldn't hide it.

In today's war situation, how can the actions of the Golden Light Supreme and others be concealed?

And the two sides need to work together to stop the destruction of creatures, so the races also ask to send some cosmic gods into the origin realm.

The Supreme Lords of the Yuan Gu and other supremes did not dare to turn their faces against the supremes of all races, so they could only agree.

Soon after, batches of top cosmic god geniuses were sent to the Origin Realm, but those who could enter the Origin Realm were all true geniuses, and some of the weaker cosmic clans did not have a quota to enter the Origin Realm.

But even so, there were nearly 1,000 cosmic gods who broke into the origin realm.

And Ye Tian didn't know all this, and even if he knew, he didn't care.

......

Origin Realm.

Ye Tian flew indiscriminately, and there was no clear purpose.

this day.

He came to a river that looked very ordinary, but the vitality here far surpassed that of other regions, and this vitality was a special vitality that nourished the physical body.

"If you cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique here, you can definitely speed it up a lot!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With a sweep of his copying talent, he found that there were many water-based source beasts hidden in the river, and many of them were source beast breaths that made him jealous.

This river is very large and large, and there must be a source beast of the Source Emperor level hidden in it.

Ye Tian's current strength was not the opponent of Emperor Yuan, so he landed honestly, hid his breath, and did not dare to be so arrogant.

Since he didn't know where to go, Ye Tian found a better place in a certain section of the river, and established a temporary underground cave along the river, where he was ready to cultivate for a while.

Time passed slowly –

Rumble!!!

A violent vibration of vitality was heard.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, finished his cultivation, and his divine sense looked into the distance, he felt that there was a powerful aura transmitted there, shaking this hundreds of millions of miles of vitality area.

"Fighting, not like a treasure, a bit of a possibility!"

Ye Tian was curious, so he sneaked over.

Soon, he came to the place that caused the tremors of the territory of hundreds of millions of miles.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian's expression changed, and he saw a seven-leaf black grass, saying that it was grass, but its height was at least a thousand zhang.

This seven-leaf black grass exuded a strange aroma that caused the greed of the Infinite Source Beasts to rush forward one by one.

And around the seven-leaf black grass, there were two terrifying source beasts.

One of them is a fox-like source beast, and the other is a humanoid source beast that looks a bit like a bear and a bit like an ape.

And the two source beasts stood in the void, staring at the seven-leaf black grass, and did not fight.

But as soon as the other source beasts got close to the seven-leaf black grass, the two source beasts waved their hands and slashed them.

Rumble!!!

The fox source beast made a move, and with a sweep of its tail, all the source beasts in that area were killed, not one was left, and one of the top source emperors was also annihilated with one blow.

"Shhh

Ye Tian gasped.

Where is this battle, it is clearly a slaughter!

Moreover, he roughly guessed the identities of these two source beasts.

"Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

Yuan Ancestor is a strong man comparable to the supreme in the outside world, and it is also a terrifying existence that can achieve supreme combat power just by relying on his physical body and talent.

In Ye Tian's eyes, a Origin Ancestor was even more terrifying than the Supreme.

If it weren't for the restrictions of the Source Beast, a Source Ancestor might be able to transcend it.
